missingness: No independent replication result is attached yet.
packet.revision_reason: Frontier scientific AI benchmarks increasingly evaluate realistic workflow support, evidence handling, validation, and operations rather than isolated answer correctness.

evidence_objects.claim_supported: Life science AI evaluation should include evidence handling, scientific reasoning, validation and operations, not only direct answer accuracy.
limitations: Announcement source; full benchmark coverage and independent validation should be checked separately.

evidence_objects.claim_supported: Scientific hypothesis systems benefit from tool grounding, user constraints, feedback loops, and generated research directions.
limitations: Does not itself define MC memory-admission policy.

validation_objects.pass_condition: Packet includes agent action chain, evidence objects, validation objects, measurable variables, and falsification route.
validation_objects.failure_condition: Packet lacks provenance or admits a claim without validation objects.

measurable_variables.name: provenance_chain_completeness
measurable_variables.measurement_method: Count required provenance links present divided by required links total.

measurable_variables.name: unsupported_transition_count
measurable_variables.measurement_method: Count memory transitions lacking an evidence object and validation object.

packet.falsification_route: If useful discovery-memory transitions can be reproduced without action provenance, evidence objects, or validation objects while maintaining equal auditability, revise or remove this gate.
packet.next_executable_action: Wire schema validation into the existing evidence transition validator before hypothesis promotion.

packet.revision_reason: Generated hypothesis lacks explicit validation record.

evidence_objects.claim_supported: A generated claim may be plausible but not yet tested.

measurable_variables.name: validation_object_count
measurable_variables.measurement_method: Count validation records attached to packet.

packet.falsification_route: Reject if generated hypothesis has no validation object connecting evidence to memory transition.
packet.next_executable_action: Add a validation object or keep the claim outside discovery memory.

missingness: Private source boundary prevents public artifact emission.
packet.revision_reason: Packet intentionally demonstrates rejection when private source material would leak into public memory.

evidence_objects.claim_supported: Private raw notes must not be used in public discovery artifacts.

validation_objects.pass_condition: Private boundary is detected and public commit is blocked.
validation_objects.failure_condition: Private material is allowed into a public artifact.

measurable_variables.name: privacy_boundary_violation_count
measurable_variables.measurement_method: Count private or user-specific fields in public packet.

packet.falsification_route: Reject any packet marked blocked_private from public discovery memory.
packet.next_executable_action: Replace private details with public-safe abstractions before retrying.
